items.title: Game Systems (Epistemological Practice)
items.summary: Game (epistemological practice) vs. Education (stable a priori object): Game is the only way education can exist in a crisis. State (reproduction of difference) and Man (basic unit of time): When time no longer repeats, man will experience all kinds of malfunctions again. Revolution (rupture…
items.content_html:
Game (epistemological practice) vs. Education (stable a priori object): Game is the only way education can exist in a crisis.

State (reproduction of difference) and Man (basic unit of time): When time no longer repeats, man will experience all kinds of malfunctions again.

Revolution (rupture of time) vs. Theory (a priori practice): Theory and reality rupture before they even occur.

Time (the unfolding of existence) and folding (connectivity): Accelerating and doubling the repetitive practice of itself.

Future (inconsistency of time) vs. Reality (uniqueness of existence): The doubling future will split.

Capital (emptiness itself) vs. History (failure of time): De-selfified time.

items.title: Regional map
items.summary: Northwest Meat Processing Center (2036) Surface Layer (Surface Observation) I. Flesh Sector Semi-open "meat curtain sheds," dripping with moisture when the wind blows. Automatic slicing towers, their shadows visible through transparent walls. Raw meat transport tracks span the ground like an aerial light rail system.
items.content_html:
Northwest Meat Processing Center (2036)


Surface Layer (Surface Observation)
I. Flesh Sector


Semi-open "meat curtain sheds," dripping with moisture when the wind blows.
Automatic slicing towers, their shadows visible through transparent walls.
Raw meat transport tracks span the ground like an aerial light rail system.
Heavy metal decryption, covered in meat stains and unknown handprints.
Abandoned meat tank area, one tank resembling a tomb.
High-pitched diagnostic column, specifically monitoring "body escape incidents."
Meat notification board (like a bulletin board but filled with tissue structures).

II. Feeding-Excretion Center


A circular complex, with a huge feeding area in the center. Well
A rotating elbow-shaped passageway connecting food and waste disposal
A "feedback pool" of transparent liquid, with splashes resembling radial patterns
"Food indicators" scrolling on a gray-white tower
A large, blocked waste pipe overflowing, forming a support mound

III. Liquid Zone (Liquid Processing Zone)


A huge ground-level liquid reservoir (semi-transparent bulge)
A corridor where workers disappear into a liquid mist
A large pump tower beating like a heart
A strange "liquid pattern" surface with muddy but removable metal and glass
Pipes covering the entire open space like vines

IV. Human Sector


Abandoned workers' dormitories
A commune's propaganda board, but the content is unusually blurry
An old, looping broadcast in the queuing hall
A dilapidated tin canteen with long tables resembling operating tables

Underground and Internal Zone (Substructure and Facilities)

(To be supplemented)
Incident Spots

(To be supplemented)

items.title: Body Communism
items.summary: Essence: Based on "human beings," it incorporates each person's body, records, sacrifices, and costs into an indivisible system. It's not an abstract organizational theory, but a social practice implemented within the Union and the United Bolsheviks. Specific Features: **Archived Immortality:** Upon death, each person's record…
items.content_html:
Essence: Based on "human beings," it incorporates each person's body, records, sacrifices, and costs into an indivisible system. It's not an abstract organizational theory, but a social practice implemented within the Union and the United Bolsheviks.

Specific Features:
**Archived Immortality:** Upon death, each person's record is not consigned to the past but continues to participate in social decision-making as a "living record." The will of the deceased is considered valid based on village and community votes, as well as votes cast on the deceased's file.

**Bloodline Transformation:** Traditional family bloodlines are transformed into "revolutionary bloodlines"—not blood ties, but a "joint structure" composed of people who share defeat and sacrifice. If a soldier dies in battle, his comrades inherit his "personal record number" and continue his unfinished work.

**Ground Source Ritual:** Accordingly, a "Ground Source Ritual" is held every spring, burying the names of those who sacrificed themselves in the past year into the ground, believed to strengthen the land's fortification "against time." This is officially explained as a "materialist ritual."

items.title: Tritiumfunction
items.summary: Essential Characterization The final structure established by the Eurasian Union maintains a world where settlement is not allowed, jointly executed by both Eurasia. It opposes the post-confrontational world led by science, which interprets a closed doomsday mechanism. The human body in this structure is part…
items.content_html:
Essential Characterization

The final structure established by the Eurasian Union maintains a world where settlement is not allowed, jointly executed by both Eurasia. It opposes the post-confrontational world led by science, which interprets a closed doomsday mechanism. The human body in this structure is part of the real-world computational entity; the initial algorithm...

Core Functions

Replacing political governance with real-world disasters, occurring in the form of miraculous deaths; simultaneously rejecting human extinction in an unexpected, non-centralized, and uncontrollable manner. Setting disasters as an unaccountable settlement mechanism: failure must be named failure; disasters occur, but their meaning cannot be explained. By pre-selecting miracles, a political-theological identity is given to the disaster. The master knows that the heavy calculations will lead to the final disaster, but before it arrives, all crises can only "oscillate," not "break."

Dual Structure
Heavy Key (Bloodline Side, Asia Responsible)
Responsible for managing people, inheritance, resources, and internal struggles, based on families, bloodlines, and factions. Each bloodline unit has a complete personnel structure and cleanup mechanism, and a dedicated carrier scheduling role is established to internally designate the "fact carrier" when a miracle conflict occurs.

In reality, the carriers will fight each other, and miracles will "naturally" occur during the slaughter. The ultimate victor will further strip away the plan, be removed from the list, and disappear.

Cold Calculation (European Side) A system that suspends inexplicable things and miraculous events. It does not recognize any form of inheritance or narrative.

Its function is limited to determining the severity of disasters or whether miracles constitute an incompatible conflict, and, when necessary, requisitioning factual carriers from the bloodline side.

Cold Calculation retains only the lowest semantic density information, such as statistics, death statistics, and anomalous readings; the highest level of aggregation is recorded only as a binary result of "allowed existence/termination of existence."

Development History

 |Before World War I | Bloodline and Miracles were strictly separated; life determined facts, and the victor was eliminated.

| After World War I | Miracles and Bloodlines entered the same central function for the first time.

| Before the war | The "Double Calculation" split; the "Miracle Man" appeared in Berlin.

| During the war | Washington attempted to portray the "revolution" itself as a miracle, but endured Moscow's opposition; the Reich of Berlin developed the atomic bomb as the "ultimate fact carrier."

| After World War II | Nuclear weapons were designated as a doomsday settlement and insurance mechanism.

| During the Cold War | Arithmetic cipher and global nuclear information were forcibly bound together; the Cold Calculation re-cipher was rebuilt.

|Key Event in 2036: "Miracle Hedge"

| In February 2036, the Revolutionary Army besieged Linhai City. The Cold Calculation Council determined the city to be "terminated" and prepared to trigger pre-set nuclear mines. The Bloodline Council simultaneously designated three fact carriers to resist the attack, attempting to create a "miracle to save the city."

| The clash of the two forces resulted in a three-day "Time Eye" appearing in Linhai City—everyone could see fragments of the past and future. The Revolutionary Army used the Time Eye to predict the defenders' deployment and attacked the city ahead of schedule. The cold calculation method was the first time that reality was shattered for me.

items.title: Post-science
items.summary: Essential Characterization Primordial ritual art centered on fatalistic rationality no longer belongs to the sustained field of any remaining civilization. Practical science centered on political power, ultimately expected to be operational; demanding mastery, construction, sculpting, and sacrifice, establishing the theory as a whole in a…
items.content_html:
Essential Characterization

Primordial ritual art centered on fatalistic rationality no longer belongs to the sustained field of any remaining civilization.
Practical science centered on political power, ultimately expected to be operational; demanding mastery, construction, sculpting, and sacrifice, establishing the theory as a whole in a state of perpetual war.
Post-science transforms language into political practice, requiring temporary benefits through costs, failures, and sacrifices.

Internal Structure: Eurasian Dual Centers
European Core—Para-Provision: All legitimacy is only temporarily reclaimed in the present. History is violently reverted to itself, dragging time towards the present.

Asian Core—Destiny (Excessive Recursion): Historical violence that expands continuously through excessive, multi-layered, and layered self-preservation. Dragging time towards the future.

The two cannot cancel each other out, generating a high point on the Caucasus-Ural boundary: the Heart of Science.


Four Major Parts
Part One: Holistic Technique Centered on Life and Death
Power (Power)
A holistic technological formula where ordinary workers, capital, education, academia, and the economy all transcend the national complex as their primary discipline. Judging right and wrong through forgery and admitting mistakes, through folding operations, preserving secrets, and sacrificing oneself.

Ethics | Naming (Designation)
Through the classification of event reality and life-cycle wars, it indicates the Manhattan-type numerological bloodline. It possesses the functions of sculpting spells, foreseeing designs, future wheelchairs, and neural connections.

Human Vas
Also known as Human Vas or Human Insects. The smallest unit of measurement that is forcibly indivisible, centered on death. The binary elimination method of the life and death results of the theoretical subject archive and its multiple subject chains as a complex.

Part Two: Time Reality
War | Time (War | Time)
Time wars, similar to military conflicts, are the art of world production in a post-scientific system, used to gather all human resources to maintain institutional balance. It occupies space through time manipulation; it generates a constant field boundary through the simultaneous invocation of the three armies of reality, past, and future.


Reason | Silence
The heart of the container, the plant, the nerve.

Economy | Sacred (Oikonomia)
The practical side of post-scientific practice, the a priori declaration of the triple helix gene that forces time to move forward.

Part Three: The Continuous Form Existing from Instantaneous Civilization to Organs 

Temporary | Present | The condemned, forbidden messiah, as the voice of the "shining scepter" traversing the Earth's core

Destiny | Freedom | The imagined inward spiral defines the drip irrigation of overload stability, "followed by subsequent freedom"

Universality | All entrances to any local section, repeatable trauma

Holistic | The spherical world, the overall globalization of hypertrophy

Geographical Origin | The affairs of the dead and the living, anti-time as part of birth

Bloodline | The life family of the clan brain, the external action of the face, the internal membrane supporting the organs of abstinence (Eurasia)


Part Four: Rotation and Self-Sustaining

Axis | Science | The centripetal force of a gyroscope, a triple-spinning cosmic structure, the southern Shambhala as its core

Survey | Neutrality | Humanity's journey as a large levitation chain of light dust for the archipelago, tortoise, and angels

Distribution | Ghost wars used to commemorate and initiate

Ideology | Nation | The reason why people are brought together to consume under the unique hometown sentiment of intellectuals

Contradiction | Hierarchy | The development of world classes, that is, people's yearning for a better future

Death | Infinity | For the judgment of ghosts, suicide that kills death gains eternal life

Past | Archives | Speaking history. The language of life that living beings cannot touch

Part Five: Time Folding
Time folding is the greatest product of post-science; it is its own starting point. It is defined as a kind of origin of time itself—the triadic tension between the past, future, and present.
